This function handles initial UL RRC messages and includes a call to rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest, which is directly related to the error. However, it does not handle errors or rejections, so the relevance is moderate.

This function processes RRCConnectionReconfiguration, which is related to RRC messages but does not directly handle RRCSetupRequest or errors, making it less relevant to the segmentation fault in rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest.
This function prepares an RRCSetupRequest but does not handle errors or rejections, making it somewhat relevant but not directly related to the segmentation fault.
This function configures RRC parameters but does not directly relate to RRCSetupRequest handling or error management, resulting in low relevance.

This snippet does not provide enough context or functionality related to RRCSetupRequest or error handling, making it less relevant.
This function deals with E1 connection loss and does not relate to RRCSetupRequest or error handling, making it less relevant.

CRITICAL RRC REJECTION FUNCTION: This function is essential for handling RRC setup failures. When an RRC setup request fails or encounters errors, this function generates and sends an RRCReject message to the UE, properly handling the rejection scenario. For segmentation faults in rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest, this function should be called in error handling paths to gracefully reject the connection instead of crashing.

phase3_fixes.error_text: Segmentation fault in rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest at line 1065

fix_suggestion.reason: Null pointer dereference due to rrcSetupComplete being set to NULL before use.

code_patches.description: From commit e765a26b6dc3c0791c4fc5b282a5e0b1b8bdc979: Fix RRC setup procedure

fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: The crash occurred because rrcSetupComplete was set to NULL before being passed to the function, leading to a null pointer dereference when trying to access its members.

investigation_commands.hint: Check for any configuration related to NGAP in the specified source file to identify potential issues.
Test basic connectivity to the AMF to ensure it is reachable from the gNB.

terminal_commands.explanation: Review the handling of `ue_Identity.present` in the RRC setup request implementation.
Test basic connectivity to the AMF.

terminal_commands.command: ip route add 192.168.70.132 via 10.138.77.217 dev eth0
terminal_commands.explanation: Add static route for AMF through the core network machine.

commit.subject: Fix RRC setup procedure
commit.author: chinchans <vangalachandu77@gmail.com>
commit.body:
Fix RRC setup procedure

Error Message: "Segmentation fault in rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest at line 1065"

Applied 1 code patches and 0 config patches.

Selected Patch Details:
- Code: rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest (rrc_gNB.c) (rrc_gNB.c)
Description: From commit 90e73ac93515ff1d6f4830c2479de758d9f4f20d: Fix RRC setup procedure

alternatives.subject: removed reading reconfig.raw with --sa. Also a segfault upon reception of RRCSetup-CellGroupConfig when this is not in the RRC context.

selection_result.error_message: Segmentation fault in rrc_handle_RRCSetupRequest at line 1065
